label: Transparent Ant Trail motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif chroma-key source for a design-system catalog
Primary request: Create only an isolated ant trail motif: a winding pheromone-route chain of black ants, no environment, no ground plane, no text.
Subject: 18 to 24 individual black forest-floor ants viewed from directly above, complete bodies visible, glossy black chitin heads and abdomens, subtle soil-brown legs and mandibles, a few ants carrying tiny muted leaf-green fragments and soil-brown crumbs integrated with the trail, accurate insect anatomy, crisp silhouettes, natural variation in pose and spacing.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding on all sides; form a clear S-curved trail with one small branching path so it suggests network logistics and route coordination; do not crop antennae, legs, or carried fragments.
Lighting/mood: clean soft overhead studio light preserving glossy black ant detail and brown-green natural accents, without cast shadows.
Transparent workflow: place the ants on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Keep every ant fully separated from the background with crisp edges and generous padding. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no soil background, no forest floor scene, no nest, no second insect species, no labels, no watermark, no logo, no text, no contact shadow, no reflection.

label: Light design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Ant Trail" / "Ant Trail", derived from the visible isolated ant trail motif. This is a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible source board for a network logistics system inspired by ants coordinating routes across a forest floor.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, 4K-class design source, target 3840x2160. Use a precise grid and large readable section labels.
Reference use: extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the ant trail motif: glossy black ant bodies, soil-brown fragments, leaf-green carried pieces, route branching, pheromone path logic, compact movement, forest-floor grain.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Ant Trail", motif story, palette swatches with names, English typography, Japanese typography with sample "\u65e5\u672c\u8a9e UI", components, navigation/sidebar, dashboard/data charts, forms, tables, command/search, status badges and alerts, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
UI content: operational route-planning dashboard with compact sidebar navigation, top command search, route health KPI tiles, queue throughput chart, pheromone path network diagram, task table, filters, form controls, tabs, buttons with icons, inputs, select, textarea, checkboxes, radio, switch, segmented controls, badges, alerts, loading/empty/error states.
Visual language: quiet logistics product UI, crisp shadcn-style components, 8px radius or less, fine ant-trail dotted dividers, route-node connectors, black chitin primary actions, soil-brown structural panels, leaf-green success accents, tan paper surfaces, restrained texture like compacted soil and leaf veins. No decorative landing page hero.
Color palette: Chitin Black #171510, Soil Brown #6d4b32, Packed Earth #9a7652, Leaf Green #5f7c45, Moss Signal #8aa05f, Parchment Sand #eee4d1, Trail Taupe #b7a58f, Amber Pheromone #c48a3a, Burrow Shadow #2b241b. Use only these motif-derived colors and close neutrals.
Typography: compact logistics hierarchy, strong headings, tabular numerals, route labels, Japanese UI guidance using Noto Sans JP style; keep labels short and readable.
Layout rules: stable 8px spacing system, visible radius token max 8px, compact tables and dense dashboard regions, no card-inside-card compositions, no oversized rounded rectangles.
Constraints: no generic purple or blue gradients, no neon, no unrelated saturated colors, no beige-only palette, no huge rounded cards, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelled theme title, no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Ant Trail" / "Ant Trail", translated from the visible light board and isolated ant trail motif. It must feel like the same network logistics system in dark mode, not a different theme.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, 4K-class design source, target 3840x2160. Use a precise grid and large readable section labels.
Reference use: preserve the light board structure, component language, ant-trail dotted dividers, route-node connectors, dashboard/table/forms layout, typography guidance, and palette roles. Derive dark surfaces from chitin black, burrow shadow, deep soil brown, and compacted earth; keep leaf green success accents, amber pheromone focus/warnings, parchment highlights, and taupe borders.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Ant Trail", label "Dark Mode", motif story, palette swatches with names, English typography, Japanese typography with sample "\u65e5\u672c\u8a9e UI", components, navigation/sidebar, dashboard/data charts, forms, tables, command/search, status badges and alerts, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
UI content: dark operational route-planning dashboard with compact sidebar navigation, top command search, route health KPI tiles, queue throughput chart, pheromone path network diagram, task table, filters, form controls, tabs, buttons with icons, inputs, select, textarea, checkboxes, radio, switch, segmented controls, badges, alerts, loading/empty/error states.
Visual language: quiet logistics product UI, crisp shadcn-style components, 8px radius or less, matte black ant-chitin panels, deep soil-brown cards, thin taupe borders, dotted pheromone route separators, network node connectors, leaf-green active states, amber rings, parchment text, subtle forest-floor texture, restrained contrast.
Color palette: Burrow Shadow #2b241b, Chitin Black #171510, Soil Brown #6d4b32, Packed Earth #9a7652, Leaf Green #5f7c45, Moss Signal #8aa05f, Trail Taupe #b7a58f, Amber Pheromone #c48a3a, Parchment Sand #eee4d1. Use only these motif-derived colors and close neutrals.
Typography: compact logistics hierarchy, strong headings, tabular numerals, route labels, Japanese UI guidance using Noto Sans JP style; keep labels short and readable.
Layout rules: stable 8px spacing system, visible radius token max 8px, compact tables and dense dashboard regions, no card-inside-card compositions, no oversized rounded rectangles.
Constraints: no neon, no pure flat black void, no generic purple or blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no beige-only palette, no huge rounded cards, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelled theme title, no tiny unreadable paragraphs.
